steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The key signal is “the eighth most commonly used password”—the passage is highlighting a widespread pattern in actual human behavior.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Popular is the only word that directly captures widespread adoption and prevalence. The other three (creative, complex, useful) describe qualities rather than scale, and complex actively contradicts the passage's claim about the approach favoring convenience over security. That matches choice B — B is correct.
